selection.algorithm: Within each question type, sort ascending by SHA-256 of UTF-8 'semantic-okf-astro-harbor-v1\0' plus question ID, then allocate 60/20/20 percent.
selection.contamination_override: q039 and q040 were already inspected or used for tuning and are forced into train; the remaining hard slots retain deterministic hash order.
selection.warning: The holdout is question-label-disjoint only. Ground truth is already checked in and authoritative Astro pages overlap cohorts.
